title: Jojo: Stand Proud Datapack
description: Hey guys, this is a test release for a datapack I plan on going more in depth in for the future.  It might be a bit buggy but I think it's still quite fun.  Also, So far it's only stuff from part 1 of Jojo's bizarre adventure.
body:
# Important
This is an early test release of my Jojo datapack.  I need to save up for a new pc before I make the full version, but I hope this one is fun none the less
## This pack adds:
 -Hamon
 -Vampirism
 -Cyborg
 -Pillar Men Modes
 -The Ultime Life Form
## Pack Info:
Since this is an early release you can only get the items in creative, use the command "/function cegm:give" to obtain every item.
Also, to use an item put it in your offhand, then to become a vampire/pillar man you need to kill a mob while wearing the mask.
Drop the red stone of aja and ultimate mask on the ground to combine them, then go into sunlight as a pillar man to become The Ultimate Life Form.
To become a cyborg use the "blue prints" item then die to activate it.
Lastly, use the "Blood Apple" to remove ALL special abilities that you have.
